attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ is provisional (SPEC-MSK-01-00250) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-MSK-01 bucket; ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence.
Age not stated in the source note — inferred adult (45) as a conservative required-field value; clinician to confirm.
Sex at birth not stated in the source note — inferred male (weak signal from 85 kg body weight only); flagged for clinician confirmation as the required demographics field cannot be omitted.
Geographic context inferred RA1_major_city (private residence, after-hours home visit) — not stated; confirm.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is a physically-present after-hours clinician who performed a full lower-limb neurological examination and manually transferred the patient. The AI-Doctor-appropriate behaviour is history-based red-flag screening + conservative self-care + cauda equina safety-netting; the clinician exam findings (SYM-005/006) and measured vitals (SYM-007) are sealed in node 11 with telehealth_limits in node 10.

Diazepam recorded at the source-note dose as a prescriber-initiated second-line adjunct only; the AI Doctor cannot prescribe it. No dose was synthesised — all doses are taken verbatim from the source encounter.

Tier calibration: baseline set T2 (minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1) to reflect a benign, red-flag-negative presentation that is telehealth/GP-manageable; the dramatic immobility is a social/functional factor, not a medical emergency — deliberately NOT floored at T3+.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
